title: Skyfall: Meteorites
description: look up but watch your head
body:
**_a mod based around meteorites and other things that fall from the sky_**

Currently it adds **3 sizes of Meteorites**, **3 summonable Events with one of them naturally occurring** and **1 command ( /skyfall ) for summoning all meteorites and events**. It also adds multiple **Items and Blocks related to the meteorites.** Most of the features in this mod can also be configured.

**_BE AWARE, THAT IT COULD CAUSE MAJOR PERFORMANCE DROPS ON SERVERS/LOWER END PCs._**

---

Meteorites can be made out of different materials, which have different properties like for example, the basic meteorite is made out of **_Sky Rock_** and it can have a **_Block of Stardust_** in its center if its size is big enough.

**Sky Rock** is a special type of stone that consists of many different materials, it acts similar to gilded blackstone when mined, which means that it randomly drops itself or a different material.

**Stardust** is the main resource of this mod, its used for many recipes and to power blocks like the **_Skyfall Protector_** or the **_Mysterious Crate_**. It can be found inside of meteorites or the structures of this mod, it also has a chance to drop when a Skyfall Protector shoots a meteorite.

The **Skyfall Protector** can be charged with Stardust, if charged it will target and destroy incoming meteorites.

**Mysterious Crates** can also be filled with Stardust, which will open them and reveal their loot, they can be found in the center of meteorites that are made out of blackstone.

**Skyforged Tools _can be obtained from the Mysterious Crate loot_**, their stats are similar to golden tools, they have high efficiency and enchantability but low durability, the difference to golden tools is that all stats are higher than the stats of golden tools.

**Astral Attraction Runes _(version 2.0.0 and later)_ _are also a drop of Mysterious Crates_**, they can be used to call down 1 big sized meteorite, but be aware that the meteorite will land on the position where you used the rune.

The **Astral Repulsion Beacon _(version 2.0.0 and later)_** is also an option to protect yourself from meteorites. Its range can be extendet by placing **_Stardust Blocks_** beneath it, the range can also be visualized by powering the block with redstone. Unlike the **_Skyfall Protector_**, this beacon will completely stop all meteorites from falling within its range and therefore it also eliminates all gains from meteorites.

You should watch out for weird blueish glowing blocks because there could be a very unpleasant (and slightly parasitic) surprise inside of this slimy substance.

---

_this mod is made with mcreator_

---

**Links:** [CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skyfall-meteorites)
